title: Alstom India is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Alstom India is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Quality Control Engineer looking for your next big career move? Alstom India in Lucknow offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Alstom India:
Alstom India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Kaizen

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Referral bonus program
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Alstom India!
